hooks.command: H=$(command -v shasum >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'shasum -a 256' || echo 'sha256sum'); DIFF_RC=0; git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null || DIFF_RC=$?; UNTRACKED=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | head -c1); if [ "$DIFF_RC" != "0" ] || [ -n "$UNTRACKED" ]; then REPO_ID=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null | $H | cut -d' ' -f1 | head -c 12); CURRENT_HASH=$( (git diff HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | LC_ALL=C sort | while IFS= read -r f; do printf '\0%s\0' "$f"; cat "$f"; done) | $H | cut -d' ' -f1); if [ -z "$CURRENT_HASH" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Hash computation failed — check that shasum or sha256sum is installed."}'; else LAST_HASH=$(cat "/tmp/.codex-last-reviewed-hash-${REPO_ID}" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$CURRENT_HASH" != "$LAST_HASH" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Code changes detected since last Codex review. Run the codex-review-code skill to review these changes."}'; fi; fi; fi
